form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (17.19) in a Class 4, finishing a head second. Yet to miss the placings in five runs from this box, including three wins. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Placed last time at this track in a Class 4, finishing third and beaten 2.5 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Looks ready to win.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 3 lengths at Ascot Park over 390m (22.72) beating Flying Feather in Class 3 on March 31. Nicely placed and should go well.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when sixth over 295m at this track. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground and raced wide on final turn.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.57) in a Class 5, finishing a 9 length seventh. Has two successes and two minors from eight starts from box 6. Among the chances on best.

Checked around bend and forced wide.

form.formComment: Looks close to another win after his success on March 5 at this track over 295m. Last start was third over 295m in 17.37, behind Hilton Hustler. The form out of the last run measures up. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.5 lengths over 390m at Ascot Park in a handy (22.84), beating Mitcham Julian. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 6th on March 26 over 295m at this track behind Opawa Opie beaten 5 lengths (17.67) in a Class 4. Has ability and worth including.
